comment.body: well, 10 year has been lower at various points recently than when Nasdaq was, for example, a good 5-10% higher. So in that respect rates impact is not egregious. Also consider that rate cut(s) are priced in probability wise. I think this market comes down with a recession, but objectively speaking earnings do not yet validate a recession, so a major decline likely comes a quarter out at earliest. my opinion of course.
